title: OneBlock-mv
description: OneBlockMV is a GUI-based OneBlock plugin for Paper 1.21.8 with Multiverse support, custom islands, upgrades, economy, teams, automation, and advanced progression systems.
body:
OneBlockMV is a Paper 1.21.8 OneBlock plugin with Multiverse support, GUI-based island management, economy features, upgrades, automation, teams, and advanced progression systems.

How to use the plugin
Use /ob to open the main OneBlock GUI.
In the GUI, go to Island Slots to create, open, or delete up to 3 personal OneBlock islands.
Each island is created as a separate empty Multiverse world with a OneBlock setup.
Break the main OneBlock to progress through phases and unlock better blocks, loot, and rewards.
Use the GUI categories to manage:
World settings
Starter blocks
Borders
Platforms
Machines
Private settings
Teams
Progress
Meta rewards
Economy
Skills, pets, trails, and custom enchants
Extra commands
/shop – opens the buy GUI
/sell – opens the sell GUI
/spawn or /spawon – teleports to the lobby spawn
/setspawn – sets the lobby spawn location
Main features
OneBlock phase progression
3 island slots per player
Void world generation with Multiverse
Bedrock under the main block
No fall damage
Auto-pickup
Auto tools
Unbreakable tools
Daily rewards
Missions
Prestige
Generators
Minions
Spawners
Auto-sell chest
Sidebar HUD
Battle pass
Crates
Achievements
Bank
Auction system
Public island visits
Co-op missions
Skills and cosmetics
